name: @jc4649/pi-harness
description_en: 1-click umbrella for the pich harness: pulls all 12 @jc4649/* pi extensions, bundles the personal glue + code-vocab tooling, and ships an `init` bin that wires them into ~/.pi.
description_zh: pich harness 的 1 点击式伞形工具：拉取所有 12 个 @jc4649/* pi 扩展，捆绑个人胶水 + 代码词汇工具，并分发一个将它们连接到 ~/.pi 的 `init` bin。
